nasb.text: In the fullness of his plenty he will be cramped; The hand of everyone who suffers will come against him.

esv.text: In the fullness of his sufficiency he will be in distress; the hand of everyone in misery will come against him.

cnv.text: 他在滿足有餘的時候，陷入困境， 受過苦的人的手都臨到他身上。

ccb.text: 他在富足时将陷入困境， 各种灾祸将接踵而至。
